name: Coffee Brewing Basics
description: Five-page test course covering the fundamentals of brewing coffee at home — beans, water, methods, and tasting. Used to validate parta-sync handling of multi-page projects with images.

pages.name: Welcome
pages.description: What this course covers and how to follow along.

pages.name: Beans and Grind
pages.description: Choosing fresh beans and matching grind size to your method.

pages.name: Water and Ratios
pages.description: The ingredient most people overlook, and the dose-to-water math.

pages.name: Brewing Methods
pages.description: Pour over, French press, and espresso — when to use each.

pages.name: Tasting and Improving
pages.description: How to taste deliberately and dial in your next brew.
